title: selago dolichonema
intro: Selago dolichonema, also known as the Long-stalked Selago, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selago dolichonema are attributed to its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Selago dolichonema are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
